tasks.label: Inspect flutter_sound package
tasks.command: ls -la ~/.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev | grep '^d' | grep flutter_sound && echo '---' && ls -la ~/.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/flutter_sound-*/

tasks.label: Build macOS release via script retry
Build macOS release via script final retry
Test pod install with cert env
tasks.command: cd macos && SSL_CERT_FILE=/etc/ssl/cert.pem CURL_CA_BUNDLE=/etc/ssl/cert.pem pod install

tasks.label: Inspect flutter_sound plugin metadata
tasks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import re, pathlib
p=pathlib.Path.home()/'.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/flutter_sound-9.30.0/pubspec.yaml'
text=p.read_text()
start=text.find('plugin:')
print(text[start:start+600])
PY

tasks.label: Repair flutter_sound pubspec block
tasks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path.home()/'.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/flutter_sound-9.30.0/pubspec.yaml'
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace('''      linux:
        pluginClass: FlutterSoundPlugin
      TaudioPlugin
      windows:
        pluginClass: FlutterSoundPluginCApi
''', '''      linux:
        pluginClass: FlutterSoundPlugin
      macos:
        pluginClass: TaudioPlugin
      windows:
        pluginClass: FlutterSoundPluginCApi
''')
p.write_text(text)
print('patched')
PY
sed -n '60,90p' ~/.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/flutter_sound-9.30.0/pubspec.yaml

tasks.label: Make script executable and verify app
